description: Machine-readable risk classification and merge policy contract. All CI workflows and agents MUST respect this.

high.description: Dashboard, CI infra, and control-plane changes require full gate + review

medium.description: Data pipeline and model changes require tests + lint

low.description: Docs and markdown need lint only

docsDriftRules.require: If control-plane files change, corresponding docs must be updated in the same PR

schemaProtection.rule: Schema changes require coordinated PRs — if a project changes DB schema, a companion admin-dashboard PR must verify compatibility
